title: How to build your first AI agent without code
post:
You don't need to write a single line of code to build an AI agent.

Here's my no-code setup that runs 20+ automations for my business:

1. Define the workflow step-by-step (what triggers it, what does it do, what's the output?)
2. Choose your agent platform (I use Make.com + Claude)
3. Connect your tools (email, Slack, Google Sheets, your CRM)
4. Write clear instructions for each step
5. Set error handling—what happens when it fails
6. Test with 10-20 samples before going live

The biggest mistake I see? People skip step 1. They jump straight into building without mapping out the workflow.

A well-defined process beats sophisticated tooling every time.

Want me to share my exact agent templates? Thoughts?
